subject: CI: Update CBOM workflow with fixes
commit_message:
CI: Update CBOM workflow with fixes

Replace unconditional checkout-gerrit-change-action with
conditional logic for three event scenarios:
- push: 10s replication delay then actions/checkout
- workflow_dispatch with Gerrit: checkout-gerrit-change
- workflow_dispatch with GERRIT_DISABLED: actions/checkout

Add the missing gerrit-project input and update all
pinned action versions to their latest releases.

Issue-ID: CIMAN-33
Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Change-Id: I6abab82fbbd5ea6bbe89af4c133fd50176e661aa
Signed-off-by: Matthew Watkins <mwatkins@linuxfoundation.org>
